root_cause: CrashLoopBackOff caused by missing or delayed volume
evidence: Pod app-pod running with PVC(s) that transitioned from Pending to Bound and failing containers

causes.message: PersistentVolumeClaim(s) were Pending during container startup: app-pvc
Container restarted repeatedly while waiting for required volume
Pod entered CrashLoopBackOff due to earlier volume unavailability

pod:app-pod: Container in CrashLoopBackOff or not ready after PVC Bound
